title: baptisia lactea var. obovata
intro: Baptisia lactea var. obovata, also known as white wild indigo, is a perennial legume native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat a variety of ailments. The health benefits of Baptisia lactea var. obovata include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions and wound healing. Baptisia lactea var. obovata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
